title: Patch the Plan
mission: Help more women enter cybersecurity by making the path fit the learner.

exchange.line: I missed Tuesday. Did I fail cybersecurity?
No. The schedule failed its user.
One tiny mission, one visible win, and permission to restart.

finding: Barrier patched. #8377 used Codex to turn an overwhelming cyber roadmap into an ADHD-friendly learning loop and the personal tools she needed.
lesson: Women belong in cybersecurity. Good systems adapt to people.
